ast.source: Geulo debug mode enabled. Reload the plugin to see debug logs.
ast.target: Geulo 调试模式已启用。重新加载插件以查看调试日志。

ast.source: Geulo debug mode disabled. Reload the plugin to stop debug logs.
ast.target: Geulo 调试模式已禁用。重新加载插件以停止调试日志。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Already loading videos, skipping duplicate call
ast.target: 正在加载视频，跳过重复调用

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Clear stored liked videos in local storage
ast.target: 清除本地存储中已存储的喜欢视频

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 打开 Google 开发者控制台

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays the quota of liked videos fetched from the YouTube Data API v3, indicating how many videos you can store (up to 5000).
ast.target: 显示从 YouTube Data API v3 获取的喜欢视频配额，指示您可以存储的视频数量（最多 5000 个）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Numbers of liked videos to fetch at each time of API request. Set this up to your rate of your video consumption pattern.
ast.target: 每次 API 请求时获取的喜欢视频数量。请根据您的视频消费模式进行设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, videos will be opened in the Obsidian web viewer instead of the OS's default browser even when its 'Open external links' option is turned off. You need to ENABLE THE "WEB VIEWER" CORE PLUGIN for this to work.
ast.target: 如果启用，即使操作系统的“打开外部链接”选项已关闭，视频也将在 Obsidian 网页查看器中打开，而不是在操作系统的默认浏览器中打开。您需要启用“网页查看器”核心插件才能使此功能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify where video notes should be created. Leave empty to use Obsidian's default new file location, or enter a custom folder path. Default is 'Youtube'.
ast.target: 指定视频笔记的创建位置。留空则使用 Obsidian 的默认新文件位置，或输入自定义文件夹路径。默认为 'Youtube'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create subfolders for each channel (e.g., Youtube/Channel Name/video.md). Only applies when using a custom video note location.
ast.target: 为每个频道创建子文件夹（例如，Youtube/频道名称/video.md）。仅在使用自定义视频笔记位置时适用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a new note will be created for each new video fetched.
ast.target: 如果启用，将为每个新获取的视频创建一个新笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a link to the new video note will be added to your daily note.
ast.target: 如果启用，新视频笔记的链接将添加到您的每日笔记中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use custom markdown templates for video notes instead of the default format
ast.target: 使用自定义 Markdown 模板作为视频笔记，而不是默认格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Edit your video note template directly. Use {{variable}} syntax for dynamic content.
ast.target: 直接编辑您的视频笔记模板。使用 {{variable}} 语法表示动态内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 配置 AI 驱动的功能

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Google Gemini to generate AI summaries of YouTube videos. Requires a Gemini API key.
ast.target: 使用 Google Gemini 生成 YouTube 视频的 AI 摘要。需要 Gemini API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which AI provider to use for video summaries.
ast.target: 选择用于视频摘要的 AI 提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google Gemini API key. Get one from [Google AI Studio] (https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey). Only Google AI Studio support video_url at this time. Vertex AI does not support video_url yet.
ast.target: 您的 Google Gemini API 密钥。从 [Google AI Studio] (https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey) 获取。目前只有 Google AI Studio 支持 video_url。Vertex AI 尚不支持 video_url。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your OpenRouter API key. Get one from openrouter.ai/keys.
ast.target: 您的 OpenRouter API 密钥。从 openrouter.ai/keys 获取。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a Gemini model ID from OpenRouter (e.g. google/gemini-3-flash-preview).
ast.target: 输入来自 OpenRouter 的 Gemini 模型 ID（例如 google/gemini-3-flash-preview）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the prompt sent to Gemini when generating video summaries.
ast.target: 自定义生成视频摘要时发送给 Gemini 的提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure automatic fetching of liked videos
ast.target: 配置自动获取喜欢的视频

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically fetch liked videos at regular intervals
ast.target: 定期自动获取喜欢的视频

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to automatically fetch videos (in minutes)
ast.target: 自动获取视频的频率（以分钟为单位）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically fetch videos when Obsidian starts
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动获取视频

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Functions to fetch and update liked videos
ast.target: 用于获取和更新喜欢视频的功能

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click the button below to open the Google Developer Console, where you can manage your Google APIs and credentials.
ast.target: 点击下方按钮打开 Google 开发者控制台，您可以在其中管理您的 Google API 和凭据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Client ID required to authenticate your Google account and access the YouTube Data API v3.
ast.target: 用于验证您的 Google 帐户并访问 YouTube Data API v3 的客户端 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Client secret for accessing the YouTube Data API v3
ast.target: 用于访问 YouTube Data API v3 的客户端密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 登录您的 Google 帐户

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the verbosity of debug logs
ast.target: 设置调试日志的详细程度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log all API requests and responses
ast.target: 记录所有 API 请求和响应

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override auto-fetch interval for testing (0 = use normal setting)
ast.target: 覆盖自动获取间隔以进行测试（0 = 使用正常设置）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trigger an immediate fetch for testing
ast.target: 触发立即获取以进行测试

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open Videos in Obsidian Web Viewer
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 网页查看器中打开视频

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每次自动获取时进行完整获取

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fetch all liked videos so far and add to local storage. This will override all the liked videos in local storage.
ast.target: 获取迄今为止所有点赞的视频并添加到本地存储。这将覆盖本地存储中所有点赞的视频。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fetch all liked videos so far, compare to the stored videos and filter/add the new videos to local storage
ast.target: 获取迄今为止所有点赞的视频，与已存储的视频进行比较，并将新视频过滤/添加到本地存储。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 打开 YouTube 数据 API 控制台

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动获取间隔覆盖（分钟）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 Gemini API 密钥

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 重新生成 AI 摘要

ast.target: 无法创建自定义文件夹，使用默认位置：

ast.target: 无法在默认位置创建频道文件夹：

ast.target: 自定义模板为空，使用内置格式

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Full fetch mode enabled - fetching ALL liked videos. This may consume significant resources.
ast.target: ⚠️ 完整获取模式已启用 - 正在获取所有点赞的视频。这可能会消耗大量资源。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 此设备无法使用此 OAuth 方法

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Refresh token for Google API is missing or expired
ast.target: Google API 的刷新令牌缺失或已过期

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Access token for Google API is missing or expired
ast.target: Google API 的访问令牌缺失或已过期

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to link to daily note. Check console for details.
ast.target: 链接到每日笔记失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.source: Failed to add summary to note

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create/open video note. Check console for details.
ast.target: 创建/打开视频笔记失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI Summary already exists in this note
ast.target: 此笔记中已存在 AI 摘要

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 摘要已添加到视频笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to add video to daily note. Check console for details.
ast.target: 将视频添加到每日笔记失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active note found. Please open a note first.
ast.target: 未找到活动笔记。请先打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ Debug mode: Using very short fetch interval!
ast.target: ⚠️ 调试模式：使用非常短的获取间隔！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: YouTube API quota exceeded. Please try again later.
ast.target: YouTube API 配额已用尽。请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Authentication expired. Please refresh your login.
ast.target: 认证已过期。请刷新您的登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Version reset! Reload the plugin to see the intro modal.
ast.target: 版本已重置！请重新加载插件以查看介绍模态框。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Geulo: Please authenticate first in plugin settings.
ast.target: Geulo：请先在插件设置中进行认证。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create video note automatically. Check console for details.
ast.target: 自动创建视频笔记失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate AI-powered summaries for your videos using Google Gemini or OpenRouter, with real-time streaming.
ast.target: 使用 Google Gemini 或 OpenRouter 为您的视频生成 AI 驱动的摘要，支持实时流式传输。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatic one-line summary generation after full summary, with expandable two-level view.
ast.target: 完整摘要后自动生成单行摘要，支持可展开的两级视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append AI summaries to your video notes, with context menu integration for quick access.
ast.target: 将 AI 摘要附加到您的视频笔记中，并集成上下文菜单以便快速访问。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter your video list to show only videos that have AI-generated notes.
ast.target: 筛选您的视频列表，仅显示带有 AI 生成笔记的视频。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.
ast.target: 请求频率超限。请稍后再试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Please configure your API key in Settings > AI Features
ast.target: 请在设置 > AI 功能中配置您的 API 密钥
